title: ASCEND Attribute System
description: Schema for all player attributes: 10 visible stats, 4 long-arc pillars, 4 cognitive axes. See docs/03_attributes.md for full narrative spec.

visibleStatValue.$comment: A single visible stat value — integer 0–100.

visibleStatBand.$comment: Derived narrative band (1–5). Computed from value; never stored. Documented here for engine reference.

pillarValue.$comment: A single long-arc pillar value. Starts at 1, grows 1–3 per year, max ~37 at Y12.

cognitiveAxisValue.$comment: A cognitive axis score. Spectrum from -5 to +5. 0 is neutral. Set at creation, nudged ±1/year max.

statDelta.$comment: A change applied to any stat. Used in question outcomes and consequence resolution.

delta.description: Amount to add (positive) or subtract (negative). Applied after floor/ceiling clamps.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation shown in the Consequences Drawer. Required for visible stats; omit for hidden.

hidden.description: If true, this delta is not shown in the Consequences Drawer. Used for pillar and axis changes.

anyStatKey.description: Any valid attribute key across all three layers.

visibleStatKey.description: Keys for the 10 visible stats only.

pillarKey.description: Keys for the 4 long-arc Egon Zehnder pillars.

cognitiveAxisKey.description: Keys for the 4 hidden cognitive axes.

gatingThreshold.$comment: A stat gate — a condition that must be met to unlock a feature, question, or ending.

sustained.description: If true, this threshold must have been met continuously for N years.

sustainedYears.description: Number of consecutive years the threshold must have been met. Only meaningful if sustained=true.

politicalAwareness.description: Knowing what's actually being said. Gates read-between-the-lines options and NPC subtext reveals.

strategicInfluence.description: Whether your opinion changes the outcome. Gates senior-table questions and sponsor escalation.

collaborativePull.description: Whether people want to work with you specifically. Drives peer NPC relationship growth rate.

resilience.description: How far you bounce back and how fast. Mitigates negative consequence severity; shortens recovery clock.

executionDiscipline.description: You said you would, and you did. Primary gate for Annual Review performance score and promotion eligibility.

adaptiveNerve.description: Comfort with not knowing how this ends. Unlocks bold-play options and external offer paths.

technicalCredibility.description: Whether builders trust your judgment. Gates product/CTO track and engineering NPC trust.

reputation.description: What people say about you when you're not in the room. Affects NPC baseline reactions and Annual Review comp.

marketSense.description: Understanding what the market will pay for before it's obvious. Gates commercial track and client NPCs.

integrity.description: Whether you are the same person in the dark. Gates Sofia's sentience thread, ethical arcs, and certain endings.

pillars.description: The 4 hidden long-arc Egon Zehnder pillars. Range 1–40 each. Gate L9+ promotions. Never displayed.

curiosity.description: Drive to seek new experience, knowledge, and candid feedback. Accumulated through inquiry choices and World Panel engagement.

insight.description: Ability to gather and make sense of information that suggests new possibilities. Accumulated through systemic-read choices and cross-stat thresholds.

engagement.description: Ability to connect with people in a way that generates trust. Accumulated through deep NPC investment and relationship repair.

determination.description: Courage and tenacity to pursue hard goals over time. Accumulated through track consistency, hard-path choices, and conditional-promotion resolution.

cognitiveAxes.description: The 4 hidden behavioral axes. Range -5 to +5. Set at creation via Traits; nudged ±1/year max. Never labeled to player.

socialEnergy.description: Solitary (-5) to Collective (+5). Affects dialogue framing and NPC relationship growth rates by NPC type.

signalReading.description: Concrete (-5) to Abstract (+5). Affects opportunity detection timing and Political Awareness amplification.

decisionLens.description: Analytical (-5) to Relational (+5). Affects NPC trust patterns by archetype and Integrity accumulation triggers.

operatingStyle.description: Adaptive (-5) to Structured (+5). Affects Execution Discipline vs Adaptive Nerve growth rates and Three-Lane Opportunity information depth.

annualReviewAttributeAggregate.$comment: Computed value for comp formula. Not stored — derived each Annual Review.
annualReviewAttributeAggregate.description: The 'attribute aggregate' component of the Annual Review comp formula. Weighted: Execution Discipline 30% + Strategic Influence 20% + Reputation 20% + remaining 7 stats averaged 30%.

promotionGateCheck.$comment: Struct used by the promotion engine to evaluate all gating thresholds before surfacing a promotion outcome.
promotionGateCheck.description: Result of evaluating all promotion gates for a given ladder level.

eligible.description: Whether the player currently meets all gates for this level.

failedGates.description: List of gating thresholds not currently met. Empty if eligible=true.

startingAttributeSet.$comment: Used by Character Creation (doc 0.6) to define background bonuses and trait-derived axis values.
startingAttributeSet.description: The full attribute state at game start, after background bonuses and trait axis values are applied.

visibleStats.description: Starting visible stat values (base 30 + background bonus, clamped 0–100). Integrity base 50. Reputation base 30.

cognitiveAxes.description: Set by Trait selection during Character Creation. Each trait pushes 1–2 axes by ±1 or ±2.

attributeSnapshot.$comment: A point-in-time record of all attributes. Stored in game state after each Annual Review for Career Timeline and save-state diff view.
attributeSnapshot.description: Complete attribute state snapshot for a specific year-end.
